## Create secure page for elevate
   create path /content/nyl2/us/en/elevate(cq:Page mixin granite:AuthenticationRequired,rep:CugMixin)
   create path /content/nyl2/us/en/elevate/jcr:content(cq:PageContent)
  
   ## Create secure DAM path for elevate
   create path /content/dam/nyl/elevate(sling:Folder mixin granite:AuthenticationRequired,rep:CugMixin)
   create path /content/dam/nyl/elevate/jcr:content(nt:unstructured)
 
   ## Create SAML groups 
   create path /home/groups/nyl/elevate(rep:AuthorizableFolder)
   create group elevate-employee with path /home/groups/nyl/elevate
   create group elevate-consultant with path /home/groups/nyl/elevate
   create group elevate-agent with path /home/groups/nyl/elevate
   create group elevate-agentstaff with path /home/groups/nyl/elevate
